{{ $c := hugo.Data.home.hero.carousel }} {{- $examples := site.GetPage "home/examples" -}} {{- if not $examples }}{{ errorf "Missing headless bundle content/home/examples/_index.md" }}{{ end -}}
{{ range $i, $page := sort $examples.Pages "Weight" }} {{- $kt := partial "home/extract-code-fence.html" (dict "page" $page "lang" "kotlin") -}} {{- $jv := partial "home/extract-code-fence.html" (dict "page" $page "lang" "java") -}}
{{ $page.Title }}
{{ highlight $kt "kotlin" "" }}
{{ highlight $jv "java" "" }}
{{ end }}
